tasks.title: Fix parser and lowering bugs in quench-runtime
tasks.notes: Computed member access and optional chaining are lowered. Still missing: module/script fallback, for...of/for...in, nullish coalescing, rest params, spread calls, template literal expressions, getters/setters.

tasks.title: Complete Array, Map, Set, Promise, String, and Date built-ins
tasks.notes: Array.prototype skeleton and shared prototype are wired; methods are mostly stubs. Map/Set/Promise are not implemented. JSON.parse still returns the raw string. String.repeat/padStart, Date.prototype, and Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty are missing.

tasks.title: Add missing language features to the interpreter
tasks.notes: arguments object is implemented. Still missing: for...of/for...in, nullish coalescing, rest params, spread calls, template literal expressions, getter/setter invocation, typeof undeclared identifiers.

tasks.title: Fix value and prototype model
tasks.notes: Shared Array.prototype is wired. Object.prototype, Map.prototype, Set.prototype, Date.prototype, String.prototype, and Function.prototype are not installed.

tasks.title: Fix bridge host functions and Ink globals in main crate
tasks.notes: All __ink_* functions are registered, including __ink_get_node_parent and __ink_set_raw_mode. __ink_get_node_children now populates elements.

tasks.title: Integrate event loop microtasks and verify dispatch
tasks.notes: __tb_invoke_microtasks is called after timers; hot reload re-registers bridge functions on the fresh context.

tasks.title: runtime.js compatibility tweaks
tasks.notes: runtime.js loads only because unsupported statements are silently dropped. normalizeChildren was rewritten to avoid flat/filter. No other manual rewrites.

tasks.title: Verify with parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: simple.js is expected to work. counter.js, use-bridge.tsx, and animations.tsx are blocked until runtime gaps (Map/Set, for...of, real Array methods, ??) are closed.
